title: egkathetos #1455
definition:
1) secretly to lie in wait, a spy
 2) one who is bribed by others to entrap a man by crafty words
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) secretly to lie in wait, a spy
 2) one who is bribed by others to entrap a man by crafty words

    NASB:  hired to lie in wait, lying in wait:
